title: Hoplite Essentials
description: This pack, Hoplite Essentials, will help you climb throught the leaderboards in Hoplite!
body: A **Hoplite TexturePack** to up your game in Hoplite! Here’s what it changes: * Low Fire * Low Shield * Bow & Crossbow charging indicator * Non-obstructive Particles + No particles in blocks * The "Golden Head", is Hoplite's (In case you play other servers) [CIT RESEWN REQUIRED] * Visible Ores [CEM REQUIRED] * Clean water * Trapping Tweaks * Smaller Banners * Smaller Swords * No eating particles * No Pumpkin Blur (Just in case) * Suspicious Stews indicator (CIT and NoCIT if you are on 1.21.5+) This pack, **Hoplite Essentials**, is designed to enhance your performance in Hoplite by providing **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. The low fire and shield make it easier to see your surroundings. Non-obstructive particles keep your view clean, and the Golden Head helps distinguish it from the regular Gapples in Shieldless (Other servers). The clean water makes you easier to see underwater, and the visible ores add glow to the ores so you can see them more easily! Download it now to gain a tactical advantage and **win more matches** in Hoplite! Trapping Tweaks - Next Gen Tweaks Suspicious Stews - [Vanilla Suspicious Stew CIT Pack - Minecraft Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla-suspicious-stew-cit-pack) I would like to thank **craftmatm** and the **Hoplite Trapper Community** for inspiring me with ideas to make this texture pack **Hoplite Trappers Discord: https://discord.gg/gcGFjeM6tP** ---
